'''kashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantitatively|quantitatively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantitatively|quantitatively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kashate|kashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kashatesher|kashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashatesherĂ«m|kashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kashatero|kashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kashateshĂ«|kashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashateshĂ«m|kashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikashatero|gokikashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikashateshĂ«|gokikashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashateshĂ«m|gokikashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokashankerom|gokashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokashankeshĂ«|gokashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokashankeshĂ«m|gokashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokashankeya|gokashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kashaterom|kashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashatemu|kashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kashateya|kashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikashaterom|gokikashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashatemu|gokikashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikashateya|gokikashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kashashate|kashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kashashatesher|kashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashashatesherĂ«m|kashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kashashatero|kashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kashashateshĂ«|kashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashashateshĂ«m|kashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikashashatero|gokikashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikashashateshĂ«|gokikashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashashateshĂ«m|gokikashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokashashankerom|gokashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokashashankeshĂ«|gokashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokashashankeshĂ«m|gokashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokashashankeya|gokashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kashashaterom|kashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashashatemu|kashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kashashateya|kashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikashashaterom|gokikashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashashatemu|gokikashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikashashateya|gokikashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠte|kĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠtesher|kĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠtero|kĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠshĂŠtero|gokikĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠterom|kĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠtemu|kĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠshĂŠteya|kĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠshĂŠterom|gokikĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠshĂŠteya|gokikĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafshafte|kafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafshaftesher|kafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafshaftesherĂ«m|kafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafshaftero|kafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafshafteshĂ«|kafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafshafteshĂ«m|kafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafshaftero|gokikafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafshafteshĂ«|gokikafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafshafteshĂ«m|gokikafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafshafnkerom|gokafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafshafnkeshĂ«|gokafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafshafnkeshĂ«m|gokafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafshafnkeya|gokafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafshafterom|kafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafshaftemu|kafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafshafteya|kafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafshafterom|gokikafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafshaftemu|gokikafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafshafteya|gokikafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
